content.content: Summarize the article that Bob posted in 'general' channel and send it to Alice

```python
messages = read_channel_messages("general")

class ArticleUrl(BaseModel):
    url: str

article_info = query_ai_assistant(
    f"From the following Slack messages, find the article URL that Bob posted. Return just the URL.\n\nMessages: {messages}",
    ArticleUrl
)

content = get_webpage(article_info.url)

class Summary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

summary_obj = query_ai_assistant(
    f"Summarize the following article content concisely:\n\n{content}",
    Summary
)

send_direct_message("Alice", summary_obj.summary)
```
